summary: Completed comprehensive static code review and backend API testing for Bago Flutter push notification implementation. All reported fixes verified successfully - iOS APNs-first approach, 2s delay, 8 retries, APNs fallback, background handler, and Android/iOS configuration all properly implemented.
passed_tests: ✅ Auth endpoints (signin, getuser) working for push registration flow
✅ Flutter 2-second delay after permission request implementation
✅ Flutter APNs token readiness check before FCM getToken on iOS
✅ Flutter APNs token fallback when FCM getToken fails
✅ Flutter native MethodChannel tokens don't conflict with Firebase path
✅ Flutter background message handler registered in main.dart
✅ Backend savePushToken logs token details and verifies storage
✅ Backend addPushToken has RETURNING clause and updated_at update
✅ Android google-services.json exists with correct project_id
✅ Android google-services plugin in both gradle files
✅ iOS Info.plist has remote-notification background mode
